title: Crisis Management Meeting Internal Communication - Dunwoody

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All emails, text messages, direct messages, calendar entries, meeting notes, or other written communications between or among any employees, officials, or representatives of the City of Dunwoody (including but not limited to the Dunwoody Police Department, City Manager's office, Mayor's office, City Council members, and Technology Department) referencing, discussing, or related to the Dunwoody Real Time Crime Center (RTCC) tour scheduled for February 12, 2026, from January 1, 2026 through the present.

This request includes but is not limited to internal communications discussing the planning, scheduling, purpose, attendees, or any follow-up actions related to that event.

For purposes of this request, "communications" includes records maintained on personal devices or personal accounts if such records were prepared, sent, or received in the conduct of public business.

Pursuant to O.C.G.A. § 50-18-71(b)(1), I request that responsive records be provided in their native electronic format with full metadata preserved, including but not limited to message headers, timestamps, sender/recipient information, and attachment metadata.

If any portion of this request is denied, I request that you:
(1) Identify each responsive record being withheld with sufficient detail to permit me to assess the basis for withholding;
(2) Cite the specific statutory exemption(s) claimed for each record or portion thereof; and
(3) Pursuant to the segregability requirement of O.C.G.A. § 50-18-72(a)(44), produce all non-exempt portions of partially exempt records with redactions clearly marked and justified on a field-by-field basis.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar

communications.subject: Georgia Open Records Act Request: AG/West Shore Strategies Communication
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

This request specifically includes but is not limited to:

Pursuant to O.C.G.A. § 50-18-71(b)(1), I request that responsive records be provided in their native electronic format with full metadata preserved, including but not limited to message headers, timestamps, sender/recipient information, and attachment metadata.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Jason Hunyar

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: KBF M-44s
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Any and all written or electronic communications sent or received by Karen Budd-Falen that contain one or more of the following words or phrases: "APHIS", "Wildlife Services", "M-44", "M-44s", and/or "cyanide". 

I am a reporter for Public Domain and seek a fee waiver. If that waiver is denied I am willing to pay $25.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jimmy Tobias

title: Request for records of Sonny Wayne Lewis

communications.subject: Nevada Public Records Act Request: Request for records of Sonny Wayne Lewis
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nevada Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting reports in the control & custody of the Washoe County Medical examiner  
1. Autopsy / Examination Report
Please provide the autopsy report and/or examination report for the following decedent:
Name: Sonny Wayne Lewis DOD 1/27/2013 DOB 5/7/1987
2. • Death Investigation Summary (non‑medical narrative portions)
• Scene Investigation Reports (excluding confidential identifiers)
• Toxicology Reports
• Cause and Manner of Death Determination
• Investigator Notes with redactions of confidential information
• Communications or transmittal records between the ME’s Office and law enforcement regarding this case
• Any public‑interest memoranda or correspondence related to the release or withholding of this case’s records
• Record index showing what documents exist in the case file (even if some are withheld)

If any of these records are withheld, please provide the specific legal basis for each withheld item and release all segregable portions.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Annemarie Grant
